name: @helix/security
description: Security utilities for Helix ADK: vault, DLP, leak detection

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/vault/*.ts src/detection/*.ts src/dlp/*.ts src/middleware/*.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm --sourcemap
scripts.dev: bun build --watch src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm
